highlights.summary:
The AP EAPCET 2026 registration last date has been extended to Mar 24, 2026, (without a late fee) for Anantha Lakshmi Institute Of Technology and Sciences admission to the BTech and BPharma courses. The BTech exams are scheduled for May 12 to May 15, and on May 18, 2026, followed by the BPharma exam on May 19 and May 20, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

placements.overview: Established in 2008, Anantha Lakshmi Institute Of Technology and Sciences is a private institute in Anantapur, Andhra Pradesh. The institute is approved by the AICTE. At the UG, PG and After 10th levels, the institute offers 19 courses across 7 specialisations in Full Time mode. The popular Anantha Lakshmi Institute Of Technology and Sciences programs include B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, MCA and After 10th Diploma. Anantha Lakshmi Institute Of Technology and Sciences courses are provided in several streams including Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software, etc. The institute has a total seat intake of 1800 students. The fees at Anantha Lakshmi Institute Of Technology and Sciences ranges between INR 70,000 to 2,00,800 for the different courses. The institute has a well-laid infrastructure with multiple facilities.

faqs.answer: A:    The fees range for courses offerred by the Anantha Lakshmi Institute Of Technology and Sciences is around INR 61600 - INR 172000.

faqs.answer: A:    Anantha Lakshmi Institute Of Technology and Sciences is a good institution for B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Major specialisation at Anantha Lakshmi Institute Of Technology and Sciences are Civil Engineering, Electronics Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, VLSI Design.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Infrastructure and facilities that are provided by management reached the expectations.

review_content.Placements: From 3-2 onwards, we were eligible for campus placements so that we could apply for any of the jobs that were eligible on the campus. There were a large number of companies approached our college for hiring & giving the opportunities. The highest salary package offered by our college ranges from 8 LPA - 10 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: Both the department and hostel rooms' ambiance was very attractive. Our department was always a step forward for conducting activities both technical and cultural. Library was huge and provided books for every department in separate cabins. Management provided free Wi-Fi network both on campus and hostel. Food quality was good and the variety of items also served during occasions.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: We are only satisfied with our sports.

review_content.Placements: We have Campus Recruitment Training (CRT) classes like python, cyber security, AI e. c. t. Those classes are useful to CSE or CSM students but we are from electronics and communication engineering. So there is no CRT for all branches in our college. 6 to 10% were placed on our branch in IT. The highest package is 11.25lakh per annum and the lowest is 3.5 per annum. TCL, WIPRO, INFOSYS some other MNCs. 6 to 10% got placed in TCL, WIPRO and INFOSYS.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have good electricity, good washrooms, good water purifiers, good maintenance, Wi-Fi not available, good labs and library. Sports and games are good but avarage quality of facilities in our hostel, the quality and taste of food gradually decreases every year.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: It has very good placement rates and is one of the top colleges among the affiliated colleges.

review_content.Placements: I joined here in 2020, and my passed-out year is 2024. and my percentage is more than 80%. In the CSE branch, job opportunities are offered by Wipro, TCs, HCL, Sutherland, etc. Many companies offer students jobs with average pay packages of INR 3 LPA. The role is offered by the company, which tests the talent and gives the job.
review_content.Infrastructure: This college CSE course has more job opportunities. and the staff is very friendly. Labs are conducted once a week, and the labs are conducted and executed practically. In the hostel, the warden takes care of students like her children, and hostel facilities are good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with the staff and the college is value for money.

review_content.Placements: My course is EEE. So in this course, half of the people from the final year have been selected. The highest package in our college is INR 10 LPA, the lowest package is INR 3 LPA, and the average package is INR 4.5 LPA. The top recruiting companies are TCS, CTS, Infosys, Accenture, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: In our college, the labs were okay, not so good, or not so bad. We have equipment that is needed but is limited in number. The lab was clean. Overall, we have two libraries. The hostel is just fine. The food in the hostel was not so tasty. The maintenance was good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: I'm satisfied with this college.

review_content.Placements: Around 50% of students get placed in our course. The lowest salary offered is Rs.8,000 per month and the highest salary package is Rs.50,000 per month. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Virtusa, Renewpower, etc. Top roles offered are software engineer and software developer.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel facility is very good. The infrastructure of our college is good but the fee is very high. Library is very good with all the books. The quality of the hostel facilities is good. The quality of the food is not satisfying. Hostel food can be rated as average.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: ALTS - The best college of Engineering, Anantapur.

review_content.Placements: Above the half of students got placed in our college. There is the highest package on our campus is about 13LPA and the lowest is 5LPA. review_summary.college_name: Carmel College of Engineering And Technology, Alappuzha Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied with college life and placements.

content.Placements: I think in my class there were 53 students, and most of them were placed even though they had a supply. The highest offered is 10,000/month the minimum is 3,000/month, and the average is 5,000. Most of the company names I heard for the first time. I think the only company I know is Federal Bank. There were no students who got internships. I think one student got a civil engineering post, but it’s not from college recruitment.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is not available for students actually. Labs are good, but I don't think all the infrastructure was available during my college time. And about classrooms, it’s okay for college students. And the library, I can’t say it was good because we don’t mostly get the books we want. And about the hostel, I was a day scholar, so I don’t know much about it. But from my friend, I heard it was not so good and the food was bad. There is no medical facility, no sports or games, and about the canteen, it was a flop. Nothing was there and many times students got biscuits already eaten by rats.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I am not satisfied because of events, sports, extracurricular activities, and campus life.

content.Placements: Around 20% of students got placed in the civil engineering course. The highest salary package offered is around 5 LPA - 6 LPA. The average salary package offered is around 2 LPA - 3 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 1 LPA - 2 LPA. There are no top recruiting companies in our course. Only 20-30% of students got internships.
content.Infrastructure: Our college does not encourage students in sports activities and games. It only encourages in studying. The canteen does not include breakfast, lunch, and food items. Only drinks and snacks are available in the canteen. Sports and games are average.

individual_reviews.title: Review of Carmel College of Engineering And Technology, Alappuzha.

content.Infrastructure: The college facilities are much better, as the students are able to study in a calm and peaceful environment without being distracted by any other means. The lab facilities and the Wi-Fi facilities are excellent. The canteen is the place where students find themselves more interested in different engaging activities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: The campus life at the college is what it is to be lived.

content.Placements: Placements are highly offered here and it is one of the attractive features. Many companies like TCS recruit every year and hire many students from every department and compared to other departments, the Computer Science department has the highest percentage of placement.
content.Infrastructure: The college offers hostel accommodation for both boys and girls. It has a library that consists of a large number of books. There is an auditorium where various college activities are organised. Healthy and delicious meals are provided to the students and faculty members by the college canteen.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Honest review about Carmel College.

content.Placements: Some students who got a CGPA above 9 are placed. Comparatively, placements in this college are very few, and if there is a placement, it is for low-paid jobs. Only less than 10 percent of students got good placements, while others will have to work for it. Most of the students had to go to paid internships to meet course requirements.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is decent but not enough. The Wi-Fi is there but only for staff. In a classroom, there is an average of 60 students. Library facilities are decent as there are enough books for study purposes. The hostels are very strict as you have to enter before 6 PM, there are limitations on phone usage, and the hostel mess is not that good.

faqs.answer:
LBS Institute of Technology for Women has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed Diploma in relevant stream from a recognised Institute.M.E./M.TechCandidate must have minimum 60% marks (54% for SEBC (OBC) in B.Tech. or B.E. in Computer Science & Engineering / Information Technology.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Cyber Security) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Totally a new college and looking forward to good placements and an enjoyable life here.

review_content.Placements: College is very newly opened so the placements are ongoing in a good way and also looking for good placements. It's only been 2 years, and the college yet started.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has big building and fantastic infrastructure. It attracts the newly joining students and their parents. Hostel is available on campus. It has a playground and gym. Labs are very hi-tech and have very require equipment. Classrooms have windows and fans, and also projectors. College has 79 acres of land.
review_content.Faculty: The passing percentage is around 80 to 85%. Every year is okay here. The teaching faculty members are very reachable to the students, and the seminar like programs are conducted here.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence &Machine Learning) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Excellent campus and placements, but faculty support and teaching quality need improvement.

review_content.Placements: Around 70% of students got placed. The highest package is 12 LPA, the lowest is 3 LPA, and the average is around 5. 5.5 LPA. Top recruiters included TCS, Infosys, and Wipro. About 60% of students got internships in companies like Cognizant and Deloitte. The top role offered is developer.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have good classrooms with projectors and well-experienced faculty members. The college provides Wi-Fi, excellent labs, and libraries. The college provides hostels. The hostel provides good food and comfortable accommodations. Sports and games are accessible for both day scholars and hostel residents.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence &Machine Learning) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: The college was very good with nice faculty.

review_content.Placements: As in our college, we are the first batch for engineering, so at present we are still in our 2nd year. So we are not completely aware of these placement things and packages. Still, our college has to wait for 2 more years to know about the placements and packages.
review_content.Infrastructure: In our college, we have every kind of facility, and the college campus is so good. We have proper labs and libraries, and we also have a digital library, and every book is provided in the library. Our college, however, is still in its early stages because we are the first batch.

individual_reviews.title: MBITS - A college worth considering.

content.Placements: The placement starts from the 3rd year, and the students become eligible for placements from the 6th semester onwards. The Top recruiters are TCS, Wipro, Infosys Technologies, etc. Overall, MBITS has a strong placement record, and the students are very active.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel facilities are pretty good. The rooms are perfectly fit for 4 persons, each with attached and non-attached bathroom facilities. They provide Wi-Fi facilities and a study hall on each floor. Food is very good than earlier. The food is prepared in the canteen.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Computer Science & Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The quality of this college is above average.

content.Placements: Top recruiting companies are TCS, Accenture, etc. This college starts placement program training from the second year onwards. So if we don't have any backlogs it is sure that we will get a job right after college. Starting packages are mostly average ranging from 2 LPA to 3 LPA. But after some time and experience, we will get more.
content.Infrastructure: The course has great infrastructure. They have NBA accreditation right now for CSE and ECE departments. Labs and classrooms are great and tidy. But this college lacks college life. There are not much programs in this college. They are mainly focusing only on studies. If we are okay with less college life and programs then this is a great college. Wi-Fi has good speed but it's limited to 2 GB per day weather we are in hostel or college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is an average college with good infrastructure.

content.Placements: The college is fantastic and marvelous in placements. Our college has a good placement officer. Many companies visit our college, but only a few students get placed due to low skills. Placements are good. Companies' expectations can't meet students, so placements are less. It is very difficult to get placements.
content.Infrastructure: Our college is very beautiful and has large infrastructure with many buildings. The college has a cafeteria and a good canteen. There is a basketball court and a volleyball ball court. A big ground for football and cricket is available. Wi-Fi is poor. The library is good. The hostel is poor. Facilities are average.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Not Bad as it is worth the money!

content.Placements: The college is really pathetic in terms of placements. The companies only offer very low salaries in terms of placements. Only 50% of students were placed last year. Some of the major recruiters are TCS and Virtusa. The highest salary ever offered by a company was 48 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The college has a beautiful eco-friendly campus that consists of a beautiful garden that is spread all across the campus. The food at the hostel is just as satisfactory as it is worth the money. The college provides you with unlimited Wi-Fi, a vast library of books, and a beautiful cafeteria inside the main block.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Excellent and skill-developing college.

content.Infrastructure: The college provides a better environment for studying and Wi-Fi for every student in the classrooms, and everywhere there are better practical session labs and libraries providing a wide variety of books. reviews.review_heading: This is a very good college for technical education and technology enthusiasts.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college was good. Our hotel room had decent electricity availability. The water supply was about 24X7 which was excellent. Labs were clean and well-ventilated all tools, equipment, and apparatus were available. A fully air-conditioned library was available on campus. Both the campus and hostel were Wi-Fi enabled. The quality of food available in the mess was good and justified the third price. In the college canteen, snacks were very good and fresh.
